name: Category 24: Marketing Content
description: AI-powered content generation and distribution automations

automations.name: Blog Post Generator (AI from Service Topics)
automations.description: Uses OpenAI to generate blog posts from service topics

automations.name: Content Calendar Automation
automations.description: Auto-schedules content across channels based on calendar

automations.description: Transforms blog posts into social, email, and video scripts

automations.name: Case Study Builder (from Completed Jobs)
automations.description: Auto-generates case studies from successful project data

automations.name: FAQ Automation (from Support Tickets)
automations.description: Builds FAQ database from common support questions

automations.name: Content Performance Tracker
automations.description: Monitors engagement and ROI of published content
